items.example: Making the right decision can change your entire future.
Her indecision cost her the opportunity of a lifetime.
You need to make up your mind about which university to attend.
I spent days weighing up my options before accepting the job offer.
She faced a dilemma between pursuing her career and starting a family.
We have a difficult choice to make about moving abroad.
After the new information came to light, I had to reconsider my position.
A good leader needs to be decisive in times of crisis.
